refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.description;
When an event loop is in blocking mode, polling waits until an event can be returned. Setting a blocker registers a callable that shall be invoked while the loop is waiting; should the blocker return a truthy value, polling stops and control is returned to the caller.
public voidparallel\Events::setBlocker callableblocker
Shall set the blocker for a blocking event loop

warning.simpara: Shall throw parallel\Events\Error if the loop is in non-blocking mode.
